---
title: "Social_Survey_And_Lakers"
author: "Mia Fitzgerald"
date: "4/7/2026"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning=TRUE, message=TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(forcats)

```


### Combining Levels


```{r}
gss1 <- gss_cat %>%
  mutate(marital = fct_recode(marital, 
"Pre-Marriage" = "Never married",
"Marriage" = "Married",
"Marriage" = "Separated",
"Post-Marriage" = "Divorced",
"Post-Marriage" = "Widowed",
"Missing" = "No answer"))

gss1 %>%
  count(marital) %>%
  kable()

```


^[Question 1 complete]
